title: [MTR3/4] British Rail Class 321
description: Resource pack that adds BR Class 321 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **British Rail Class 321** is a class of Electric Multiple Unit (EMU) manufactured by British Rail Engineering Limited between 1988–1991.

The first 46(+20) Class 321/3 units entered service in 1987, used by Network SouthEast on its London Liverpool Street to Cambridge and Southend services, replacing Classes 305, 307, 308 and 309. The first 30 sets of Class 321/3s are refurbished as part of the Renatus Project in Doncaster. All Class 321/3s are retired from service, with all Renatus CLass 321s storing in Ilford or Warrington, 321334, 339 and 341 with Varamis Rail, and the remainder scrapped.

The second batch of 30(+18) units entered service in 1988. They're used on the West Coast Main Line for London Euston to Northampton, Rugby and Birmingham New Street services. Some of them retained to be on the West Coast Main Line, and the rest of the others transferred to Great Eastern Main Line services gradually. Following the introduction of the new Class 350/2s London Midland released 13 Class 321/44s to First Capital Disconnect, 17 to National Express East Anglia, and 7 to Abellio ScotRail, which they will be reclassify to Class 320/4. Other than the 12 Class 320/4s, 321407, 419, 428, 429 and 440 with Varamis Rail and the 321434 for filming purposes and 321443 being stored for other purposes, they're all scrapped.

The 3 Class 321/9s are the last batch of Class 321s ordered by Regional Railways for the Doncaster <> Leeds line. They eventually transferred to Greater Anglia to allow them to get rid of the Class 360s, and scrapped in 2022.

(I can't be bothered to write the enire history of them lmao

This resource pack is to add the Class 321 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by georgecat in 2024, and overhauled by Navi_LX9702.

# What will be in this pack?
### British Rail Class 321/3:
1. Greater Anglia / Varamis Rail Blue doors (16/17m)
## Additional information and known issues:
1. There are no toilets.
2. The train door's position might not being able to align with PSD / APG's positions.
3. Gangways will be rendered between 2 intermediate front cars and might not look like coupled due to mod limitations.

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Transport UK East Anglia Limited (Greater Anglia) and Varamis Logistics Limited (Varamis Rail).
